results.snippet: Damaged lysosomes are eliminated by lysophagy via ubiquitination of lysosomal components and selective autophagy receptors. Includes galectin binding, ubiquitin tagging, VPS34, ULK1-RB1CC1-ATG13, ATG5-ATG12, and TFEB lysosome biogenesis.
